# MyDesigner

> MyDesigner is an AI-native creative team by Sukratu, based in Pune, India and serving growing companies globally. It helps teams ship websites, product UI, brand systems, pitch decks, social assets, Webflow/Framer builds, and growth creative with human creative direction, AI-speed execution, and Client Memory that compounds over time.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2020
- Based: Pune, India
- Parent company: Sukratu
- Clients served: 57 companies
- Projects delivered: 142+
- Entry points: focused creative sprints, ongoing growth design support, and custom Creative Growth Partner engagements
- Core operating model: diagnose, build Client Memory, create, ship, learn

## Services

- [Services](https://mydesigner.gg/services): Capability architecture for web, product, brand, and growth creative
- [Website Design](https://mydesigner.gg/services/website-design): Marketing websites, campaign pages, landing pages, and conversion-focused page design
- [Web App Design](https://mydesigner.gg/services/web-app-design): SaaS dashboards, product UI, internal tools, portals, and interface systems
- [Webflow Development](https://mydesigner.gg/services/webflow-development): Responsive, CMS-ready Webflow builds and launch handoff
- [Framer Development](https://mydesigner.gg/services/framer-development): Polished Framer websites, CMS structure, motion, and launch setup
- [Brand Identity](https://mydesigner.gg/services/brand-identity): AI-ready brand systems, logo direction, guidelines, templates, and visual rules
- [Presentation Design](https://mydesigner.gg/services/presentation-design): Investor decks, sales decks, strategy presentations, and reusable slide systems
- [Social Media Creatives](https://mydesigner.gg/services/social-media-creatives): Campaign assets, social posts, ad variations, carousels, and content templates
- [Booth & Exhibition Design](https://mydesigner.gg/services/booth-designs): Event graphics, booth systems, banners, handouts, and print-ready assets

## Offers

- [Conversion Website Sprint](https://mydesigner.gg/conversion-design): focused website or landing-page sprint
- [Founder Content Engine](https://mydesigner.gg/founder-content-engine): founder-led content and growth creative system
- [AI-Ready Brand System](https://mydesigner.gg/ai-ready-brand-system): brand system designed to guide future human and AI-assisted creative production
- [Pricing](https://mydesigner.gg/pricing): sprint, ongoing subscription, and custom partner options

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://mydesigner.gg): AI-native creative team positioning, services, portfolio proof, pricing, and FAQs
- [How It Works](https://mydesigner.gg/how-it-works): operating model, Client Memory, creative rhythm, and delivery process
- [Portfolio](https://mydesigner.gg/portfolio): proof across websites, product UI, brand systems, decks, social assets, and no-code builds
- [FAQ](https://mydesigner.gg/faq): buyer questions about AI, Client Memory, workflow, ownership, pricing, and fit
- [Contact](https://mydesigner.gg/contact): creative diagnosis and calendar handoff
- [Blog](https://mydesigner.gg/blog/): design, growth, product, website, and brand insights

## Comparisons

- [MyDesigner vs DesignJoy](https://mydesigner.gg/vs/designjoy): AI-native creative team versus solo request-queue model
- [MyDesigner vs Penji](https://mydesigner.gg/vs/penji): broader creative operating system versus design-only production support
- [MyDesigner vs ManyPixels](https://mydesigner.gg/vs/manypixels): web, product, brand, and growth support versus narrower subscription design output
- [MyDesigner vs Kimp](https://mydesigner.gg/vs/kimp): creative operating rhythm versus graphics/video production subscription

## Notable Clients

Dentsu, USA Table Tennis, DentalDost (ScanO), Calfus, HumanCloud, Poocho
